iobroker.prefixHint: Only ioBroker objects of type state will be imported.

migration.openTitle: Move all bindings of this instance to another instance of the same adapter type
migration.description: All bindings from the source instance are moved to the target instance of the same adapter type. Existing bindings on the target are skipped.

anwesenheit.offsetHint: Number of days in the past whose switch states are repeated.
anwesenheit.controlDpHint: Boolean data point: value 1 = Present (simulation off), value 0 = Absent (simulation on). Empty = simulation always active.
anwesenheit.onPresenceHint: What happens to simulated objects when presence is detected.
anwesenheit.simulatedObjectsHint: Select Boolean and Integer data points — bindings are created/removed automatically.
anwesenheit.noObjects: No Boolean or Integer objects found.

bindingForm.respondToReadPersistHint: Requires enabled “Persist last value” on the object.
bindingForm.topicHint: Read/Read+Write: subscribed topic; Write: publish topic
bindingForm.publishTopicHint: Topic for writing — empty uses main topic
bindingForm.payloadTemplateHint: ###DP### is replaced by datapoint value. Empty = direct payload value.

ringbuffer.validationMinDisk: Max. disk space must be greater than 0
ringbuffer.validationRetentionNaN: Retention must be a valid number

export.rfcResetTitle: Reset delimiter, quote and escape character to RFC 4180 defaults.

transform.formulaHint: Available: abs round min max sqrt floor ceil and all math.* functions. Empty = no transformation.
transform.mapJsonHint: JSON object — any number of entries.

filter.onlyOnChangeWrite: Only write if value has changed (no duplicate)
filter.onlyOnChangeTrigger: Only trigger if value has changed (no duplicate)

cron.exprHint: Fields: Minute · Hour · Day · Month · Weekday

ical.refreshHint: Calendar is reloaded at most every N minutes.
ical.rawInfo: The RAW output always delivers the raw iCal text. Filters can be added for extended analysis.
ical.noFilters: No filters yet. Each filter provides 4 outputs: Array, Next Date, Tomorrow, Today.
ical.reSyntax: Python re syntax. Empty = field is ignored.

general.title: General settings
general.timezoneHint: All timestamps in the system are shown in this timezone.
general.appearanceHint: Choose how the interface should be displayed.

apikeys.newKeySecret: ⚠ Key visible only now — copy it now!

importexport.exportDesc: Save all objects, bindings, adapter instances, KNX group addresses, logic sheets, Visu, NavLinks, AppSettings, Hierarchy, Icons and the FontAwesome API Key as a JSON file.
importexport.importDesc: Apply a JSON backup file. Existing entries are updated, missing ones created. Visu, NavLinks, Icons and all other configuration data are also restored.
importexport.dbExportDesc: Save the complete SQLite database (incl. history data and all configurations) as a file.
importexport.dbImportDesc: Upload and apply a SQLite database file.
importexport.dbImportWarning: ⚠ Warning — this action overwrites all current data!
importexport.dbImportWarning1: All current objects, bindings, adapters, Visu, logic sheets will be replaced
importexport.dbImportWarning2: History data will be replaced by the content of the uploaded file
importexport.dbImportWarning3: Adapters and Logic Engine will be restarted after restore
importexport.dbImportWarning4: Data not included in the backup will be lost
importexport.autobackupDesc: Daily automatic JSON backup of all configuration data (adapters, objects, logic module, Visu, icons, etc.). Backups are stored locally in the data directory.
importexport.autobackupRestoreDesc: Select a saved autobackup and apply it (upsert semantics — same as regular restore).
importexport.autobackupRestoreWarning1: Existing entries are updated, missing ones created
importexport.autobackupRestoreWarning2: Entries deleted since the backup will be preserved
importexport.autobackupRestoreWarning3: For a complete restore: first factory reset, then restore
importexport.autobackupRestoreOk: Restore OK: {objects} objects, {bindings} bindings, {visu} Visu nodes
importexport.knxDesc: Import an ETS project file. All group addresses (GA, name, DPT) are saved, available as suggestions in the binding form and included in backups.
importexport.knxNoAdapter: No KNX adapter instance found. Please create a KNX adapter first.
importexport.dbImportResultOk: Database restore OK: {message} ({adapters} adapters restarted). Please reload the page.

history.dbDesc: Choose where historical values are stored. Changes take effect immediately (no restart required).
history.defaultWindowHoursHint: Applies to history API calls without a from parameter.
history.filterDesc: Objects with history disabled are not stored in the history DB. Typical candidates: time, date, system values without historical relevance.

icons.empty: No icons installed yet. Upload SVG files to get started.
icons.importDesc: Upload SVG files or a ZIP archive with SVG icons. Each file is checked for valid SVG format regardless of file extension.
icons.faDesc: Import icons directly from FontAwesome 7 Free. Without an API Key, free icons are used; with an API Key, PRO icons and additional styles are available. The filename automatically includes the style (e.g. abacus-solid.svg).
icons.faApiKeyHint: The key is stored persistently and automatically used on every import.

links.title: Custom Links
links.desc: Appear in the sidebar navigation (visible to all users).
links.label: Label
links.requiredFields: Label and URL are required fields.

bindings.label: Delete all bindings
bindings.desc: Deletes all bindings. Objects and adapter instances are preserved.
bindings.confirmMessage: All bindings will be permanently deleted. Objects and adapter instances are preserved. Continue?

datapoints.label: Delete all objects
datapoints.desc: Permanently deletes all objects and their bindings.
datapoints.confirmMessage: All objects and their bindings will be permanently deleted. Continue?

logic.label: Delete all logic sheets
logic.desc: Deletes all logic sheets and stops the Logic Engine.
logic.confirmMessage: All logic sheets will be permanently deleted. Continue?

adapters.label: Delete all adapters
adapters.desc: Stops and deletes all adapter instances and their bindings.
adapters.confirmMessage: All adapter instances and their bindings will be permanently deleted. Continue?

knxga.label: Delete KNX group addresses
knxga.desc: Deletes all imported KNX group addresses ({n} GAs).
knxga.confirmMessage: All imported KNX group addresses will be deleted. Continue?

factory.label: Reset to Factory Settings
factory.desc: Deletes everything — objects, bindings, adapters, KNX GAs, logic sheets, icons and the FontAwesome API Key. User accounts are preserved.
factory.confirmMessage: All objects, bindings, adapter instances, KNX group addresses, logic sheets, icons and the FontAwesome API Key will be permanently deleted. User accounts are preserved. Continue?
factory.result: Reset: {dp} objects, {bindings} bindings, {adapters} adapters, {knxga} KNX GAs, {logic} logic sheets deleted.

common.demoMode: Demo mode — this area is read-only/locked.
common.adapterOrphanTitle: Adapter is no longer configured — filter will not match new entries.
